name: tf-report-action
description: Reports OpenTofu/Terraform workflow status as PR comments or status issues with rich plan/apply detail
author: RetailNext

scripts.lint: npm run lint:es && npm run lint:markdown && npm run lint:text && npm run format:check
scripts.bundle: npm run format && rm -rf dist && node scripts/esbuild.mjs
scripts.check:dist: npm run bundle && git diff --quiet dist/ || (echo 'dist/ is out of date. Run npm run bundle and commit the result.' && exit 1)
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:coverage:ci && npm run test:integration:coverage
